use_cases: Showcasing featured testimonials or reviews in an interactive card carousel
Displaying product collections with 3D perspective and auto-rotation
Creating interactive portfolio or project showcases with smooth transitions
Building testimonial sliders with configurable depth and overlap effects
Implementing animated feature highlights with configurable spread and tilt
ai_summary: A highly configurable animated card stack component with 3D perspective effects, configurable overlap and spread angles, and smooth spring-based transitions. Supports auto-advancement with configurable intervals, loop behavior, and hover-pause interactions. Features customizable tilt, depth, scale states for active/inactive cards, and optional dot navigation indicators.
